mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, email, phone, status, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.status}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, email, phone, status, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.status}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = VALUES(username), password = VALUES(password), name = VALUES(name), email = VALUES(email), phone = VALUES(phone), status = VALUES(status), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
